prose:
Fukui reactivity indices computed for formaldehyde (CH₂O, 4 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF, tier 'standard', density-fit RI), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N±1 states used cation (+1, doublet) and anion (−1, doublet). Partial charges via Mulliken scheme (PySCF). Geometry taken from user-supplied .xyz file without re-optimization.

Most electrophilic atom: C (atom 2), f⁺ = 0.70839. Most nucleophilic atom: O (atom 1), f⁻ = 0.46742. Dual descriptor: C = +0.59595 (electrophilic), H×2 ≈ −0.298 (nucleophilic), O ≈ +0.00071 (near-ambiphilic). Both Fukui vectors sum to 1.0000 (charge conservation satisfied). Integrity status: OK, trustworthy: true. No warnings reported — all integrity checks passed (fukui_charge_conservation_f+, fukui_charge_conservation_f-, schema_header all OK).
